title: Tiruvirkudi Veerataneswarar Temple
tagline: Tiruvirkudi Veerataneswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Veerateeswarar Temple (also called Thiruvirkudi Veerateeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple located at Thiruvirkudi in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Veerateeswarar Temple (also called Thiruvirkudi Veerateeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple located at Thiruvirkudi in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva in the form of Veerateswarar and his consort is known as Elavar Kuzhali. The presiding deity is revered in the 7th century Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil saint poets known as the nayanars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam, the 276 temples that find mention in it. As per Hindu legend, Shiva is believed to have destroyed eight different demons and the eight Ashta Veeratanam te

topPlaces.name: Soundareswararswamy Temple, Thiruppanaiyur
topPlaces.description: The Soundareswararswamy Temple or Sountharyanathar temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the God Shiva. It is situated in the village of Thiruppanaiyur, three and a half kilometres (2.2 mi) from Nannilam.

topPlaces.name: Tirupalli Mukkudal Tirunethranathar Temple
topPlaces.description: Tirupalli Mukkudal Tirunethranathar Temple (Tamil: திருப்பள்ளி முக்கூடல் திருநேத்திரநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Tirupalli Mukkudal in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Kekkarai.

topPlaces.name: Adhalaiyur
topPlaces.description: Adhalaiyur is a village in Nagapattinam district in Tamil Nadu State of India.

topPlaces.name: Enangudi
topPlaces.description: Enangudi is the main village which is unified with neighbouring villages like Adalaiyur, Karipakkam, Ketharimangalam, Putthagaram, Kayathoor, Karuppuoor, Thepiramangalam, Vawvaladi and Pakkam Kottor. The nearest town of significant size is Tiruvarur which is 16 km away, Mayiladuthurai is 30 km and Nagapattinam is around 28 km away.

topPlaces.name: Sannanallur
topPlaces.description: Sannanallur is a area in Nannilam Town in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu and part of Nannilam Taluk. Until the early 1990s, the village was part of Thanjavur district, prior to it being split into three new districts.

topPlaces.name: Alangudi, Nannilam
topPlaces.description: Alangudi is a village in the Nannilam taluk of Tiruvarur district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Neelamegha Perumal Temple
topPlaces.description: The Neelamegha Perumal Temple or Sowriraja Perumal Temple is a Hindu temple in Thirukannapuram, a village in the outskirts of Nagapattinam in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Divya Prabandha, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desam dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Neelamegha Perumal (also called as Neela Meghar) and his consort Lakshmi as Thirukannapura Nayagi.

topPlaces.name: Thirukannapuram
topPlaces.description: Thirukannapuram is a village in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu, Nagapattinam District. A popular Perumal temple (Neelamegha Perumal temple) is there.

items.note: The Soundareswararswamy Temple or Sountharyanathar temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the God Shiva. It is situated in the village of Thiruppanaiyur, three and a half kilometres (2.2 mi) from Nannilam.

Tirupalli Mukkudal Tirunethranathar Temple (Tamil: திருப்பள்ளி முக்கூடல் திருநேத்திரநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Tirupalli Mukkudal in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Kekkarai.
Adhalaiyur is a village in Nagapattinam district in Tamil Nadu State of India.

Enangudi is the main village which is unified with neighbouring villages like Adalaiyur, Karipakkam, Ketharimangalam, Putthagaram, Kayathoor, Karuppuoor, Thepiramangalam, Vawvaladi and Pakkam Kottor. The nearest town of significant size is Tiruvarur which is 16 km away, Mayiladuthurai is 30 km and Nagapattinam is around 28 km away.

Sannanallur is a area in Nannilam Town in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu and part of Nannilam Taluk. Until the early 1990s, the village was part of Thanjavur district, prior to it being split into three new districts.
Alangudi is a village in the Nannilam taluk of Tiruvarur district in Tamil Nadu, India.

The Neelamegha Perumal Temple or Sowriraja Perumal Temple is a Hindu temple in Thirukannapuram, a village in the outskirts of Nagapattinam in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Divya Prabandha, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desam dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Neelamegha Perumal (also called as Neela Meghar) and his consort Lakshmi as Thirukannapura Nayagi.
Thirukannapuram is a village in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu, Nagapattinam District. A popular Perumal temple (Neelamegha Perumal temple) is there.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tiruvirkudi Veerataneswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tiruvirkudi Veerataneswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Tiruvirkudi Veerataneswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (104 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (106 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tiruvirkudi Veerataneswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tiruvirkudi Veerataneswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tiruvirkudi Veerataneswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Tiruvirkudi Veerataneswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tiruvirkudi Veerataneswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Soundareswararswamy Temple, Thiruppanaiyur, Tirupalli Mukkudal Tirunethranathar Temple, Adhalaiyur, Enangudi, Sannanallur.
